ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the team (e.g., intermediate) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defender) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "suspended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently suspended */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue in terms of the number of spectators */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, artificial turf) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the event */,
  "opposition" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., championship, league) */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the event (e.g., 1/4 final, 2) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, completed, postponed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the match belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the score belongs to */,
  "team_score" TEXT /* Score of the team */,
  "opposition_score" TEXT /* Score of the opposing team */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Half-time score of the match */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Full-time score of the match */,
  "extra_time_score" TEXT /* Extra-time score if applicable */,
  "penalties_score" TEXT /* Penalties score if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_in_matches" (
  "player_in_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in a match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the player participated in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "injured_during_match" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player was injured during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_in_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_in_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_in_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_in_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" TEXT /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_in_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_in_match_id") REFERENCES players_in_matches ("player_in_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
